response_body:
<!DOCTYPE html>
  
    <html lang="en">
  
  <head>
        <meta charset="utf-8">
    <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    
      <meta name="ulp-version" content="1.109.0">
    
    
    
    <meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow">
    
    
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.auth0.com/ulp/react-components/1.186.0/css/main_wcag_compliant.cdn.min.css">
    <style id="custom-styles-container">
      
        




        
          :root, .af-custom-form-container .af-form {
    --primary-color: #054436;
  }
        
      

        
          :root, .af-custom-form-container .af-form {
    --button-font-color: #ffffff;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --secondary-button-border-color: #c9cace;
    --social-button-border-color: #c9cace;
    --radio-button-border-color: #c9cace;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --secondary-button-text-color: #1e212a;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --computed-readonly-color: #c2c8d0;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --link-color: #054436;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --title-font-color: #1e212a;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --font-default-color: #1e212a;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --widget-background-color: #ffffff;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --box-border-color: #c9cace;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --font-light-color: #65676e;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --input-text-color: #000000;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --input-border-color: #c9cace;
    --border-default-color: #c9cace;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --input-background-color: #ffffff;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --icon-default-color: #65676e;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --error-color: #d03c38;
    --error-text-color: #ffffff;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --success-color: #13a688;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --base-focus-color: #054436;
    --transparency-focus-color: rgba(5,68,54, 0.15);
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --base-hover-color: #000000;
    --transparency-hover-color: rgba(0,0,0, var(--hover-transparency-value));
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --ulp-captcha-widget-theme: light;
  }
        
      




        
          
        
      

        
          html, :root, .af-custom-form-container .af-form {
    font-size: 16px;
    --default-font-size: 16px;
  }
        
      

        
          body {
    --title-font-size: 1.5rem;
    --title-font-weight: var(--font-default-weight);
  }
        
      

        
          .c25421b0e {
    font-size: 0.875rem;
    font-weight: var(--font-default-weight);
  }
        
      

        
          .c935aed04 {
    font-size: 0.875rem;
    font-weight: var(--font-default-weight);
  }
  .ulp-passkey-benefit-heading {
    font-size: 1.025rem;
  }
        
      

        
          .cd1a990da, .cf0fc6d19 {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: var(--font-default-weight);
  }
        
      

        
          body {
    --ulp-label-font-size: 1rem;
    --ulp-label-font-weight: var(--font-default-weight);
  }
        
      

        
          .cb1e24496, .c732759d9, [id^='ulp-container-'] a {
    font-size: 0.875rem;
    font-weight: var(--font-bold-weight) !important;
  }
        
      

        
          
        
      




        
          :root {
    --button-border-width: 1px;
    --social-button-border-width: 1px;
    --radio-border-width: 1px;
  }
        
      

        
          body {
    --button-border-radius: 9999px;
    --radio-border-radius: 9999px;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --input-border-width: 1px;
  }
        
      

        
          body {
    --input-border-radius: 3px;
  }

  .af-custom-form-container .af-form {
    --border-radius: 3px;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --border-radius-outer: 15px;
  }
        
      

        
          :root {
    --box-border-width: 0px;
  }
        
      

        
          
        
      




        
          
    body {
      --logo-alignment: 0 auto;
    }
  
        
      

        
          
    .cc90051d2 {
      content: url('https://assets-cdn.framia.pro/home/favicon.svg');
    }
  
        
      

        
          body {
    --logo-height: 60px;
  }
  .cc90051d2 {
    height: var(--logo-height);
  }
  
        
      

        
          
    body {
      --header-alignment: center;
    }
  
        
      

        
          
        
      




        
          .c6ea08187 {
    --page-background-alignment: left;
  }
        
      

        
          body {
    --page-background-color: #000000;
  }
